ai_code:
# Feature 1: Experience efficiency score - capturing practical output per year of experience
df['experience_efficiency'] = (df['internships'] + df['projects'] + df['hackathons']) / (df['experience_years'] + 1)

# Feature 2: Technical breadth score - ratio of programming languages to certifications
# This captures whether candidate is generalist (high ratio) or specialist (low ratio)
df['technical_breadth'] = df['programming_languages'] / (df['certifications'] + 1)

# Feature 3: Academic practical balance - interaction between academic performance and hands-on work
df['academic_practical_product'] = df['cgpa'] * (df['internships'] + df['projects'] + 1)

# Feature 4: Skill depth indicator - non-linear combination showing concentrated expertise
# Certifications and research papers indicate depth, while controlling for breadth
df['skill_depth_score'] = (df['certifications'] * 2 + df['research_papers'] * 3) / (df['programming_languages'] + 1)

# Feature 5: Career momentum - captures age-adjusted experience and activity level
# Younger candidates with more experience/activity show higher momentum
df['career_momentum'] = (df['experience_years'] * 2 + df['internships'] + df['hackathons']) / (df['age'] - 21 + 1)
